name: io.github.brilliantdirectories/brilliant-directories-mcp
description: Official MCP server for Brilliant Directories — manage members, posts, leads, reviews, and more.

environmentVariables.name: BD_API_KEY
environmentVariables.description: Your Brilliant Directories API key. Generate one in BD Admin → Developer Hub → Generate API Key.

environmentVariables.name: BD_SITE_URL
environmentVariables.description: Your BD site URL, e.g. https://yoursite.com (BD_API_URL is also accepted as a legacy alias).
